incorrects.description: Student selected 'In the symbols', confusing bar graph with picture graph format

params.description: Axis numbers highlight to draw attention to where the scale is shown.

steps.text: This is a bar graph, not a picture graph. Bar graphs don't use symbols. Look at the numbers along the side. Those show the scale.

incorrects.description: Student selected 'In the title', misunderstanding where scale information appears

params.description: Axis numbers highlight to draw attention to the scale.

steps.text: The title names what the graph is about. The scale is shown by the numbers along the side. Look at those numbers. What pattern do you see?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Animation traces up the axis, highlighting each number: 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30.

steps.text: Let me show you. Watch the axis. The numbers go 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30. That's counting by 5s. The axis is where the scale lives in a bar graph. The answer is 'On the axis.' That's how bar graphs show scale of 5.
